title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 311.561 - Charges, how paid and collected
text:
311.561.  Charges, how paid and collected. — Notwithstanding any provision in this chapter, all charges imposed by this chapter shall be paid and collected as provided in sections 311.520 and 311.553, and the affixing of stamps to the containers of intoxicating liquor shall not be required or sufficient to show the payment of the charges.
(L. 1961 p. 43)
